creator: darcsis@gmail.com
text:
update editors/mg to the latest version.

Fix: 

===File ~/farm/mg.patch=====================================
 diff -ruN mg.orig/Makefile mg/Makefile
 --- mg.orig/Makefile	2009-01-12 13:01:10.672140419 +0800
 +++ mg/Makefile	2009-01-12 12:57:49.699776055 +0800
 @@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 PORTNAME=	mg
 -PORTVERSION=	20080610
 +PORTVERSION=	20090107
 CATEGORIES=	editors
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.xs4all.nl/~hanb/software/mg/
 diff -ruN mg.orig/distinfo mg/distinfo
 --- mg.orig/distinfo	2009-01-12 13:01:10.672140419 +0800
 +++ mg/distinfo	2009-01-12 12:57:31.584653602 +0800
 @@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 -MD5 (mg-20080610.tar.gz) = 68e77f8a974e6af0c735631539673ad7
 -SHA256 (mg-20080610.tar.gz) = 19895d4fd938c4f498f550ec633b5a56c7b281853f720274af3e44a35ce84d4a
 -SIZE (mg-20080610.tar.gz) = 131512
 +MD5 (mg-20090107.tar.gz) = f25a139da44c3a2f760ffec531bd996e
 +SHA256 (mg-20090107.tar.gz) = a1702268b2607dacfcc22c5ffd80845113dff5f82b794139c801d875f87ff048
 +SIZE (mg-20090107.tar.gz) = 136530
